previous_decision: PATH B — Core calculators crawled but not indexed (WRONG — based on INDEXING_ALLOWED misinterpretation)
corrected_decision: PATH A — Core calculators confirmed indexed

rationale.finding: ALL 10 core calculators have coverageState='Submitted and indexed' with INDEXING_ALLOWED and canonical match. This is the standard GSC signal for confirmed index presence.
rationale.blocker_removed: No indexing blocker remains. The core calculators ARE in Google's index.

priority_1_content_push: mortgage-affordability — highest-ROI calculator, strong US search demand
compound-interest — foundational finance concept, broad query match
loan-calculator — universal need, high volume potential
priority_2_ctr_optimization: Review meta descriptions for all 10 calculator hubs — front-load benefit/result numbers
Title tag audit — ensure each targets a primary query + includes power words
Add FAQ or intro content above calculator widgets to improve dwell time signals
priority_3_internal_linking: Add contextual internal links from indexed guides → relevant calculators
Add links from decision pages → calculator hubs
Add links from blog posts → calculator category pages
Strengthen /calculators landing page with hierarchical link structure
monitor: Track impressions per calculator in GSC (check daily for next 7 days)
Track average position — target top-10 movement within 14 days
Watch for first organic click from a calculator page

do_not: Post more Pinterest pins until approved
